title: Decision No. 45 of 2022 Regarding Rules and Procedures for Processing Sensitive Personal Data
summary: Sets specific procedures and safeguards for processing sensitive personal data, including health data, and identifies circumstances requiring prior PDPA authorisation.

theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: Sensitive personal data processing rules relevant to health data.

notes: Related instruments: Implements Law No. 30 of 2018
